ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0/1) */,
  "ship" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket (1/2/3) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger disembarked from the ship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the passenger record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the passenger record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "ship"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number (if applicable) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (S/C/Q) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ticket record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ticket record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the ship */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the ship was launched */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_companions" (
  "companion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel companion */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Passenger ID of the companion */,
  "sib_sp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "companion_name" TEXT /* Name of the companion */,
  "companion_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the companion (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the companion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the companion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("companion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_companions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate */,
  "ship_id" TEXT /* Ship ID */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate for the ship */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket for which the survival rate is calculated */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., child, adult, senior) for which the survival rate is calculated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the survival rate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the survival rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_rates_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES role_permissions ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view_passenger_data, edit_passenger_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission")
)
